close_reason: Documented byte format contract on SigningBackend::sign in secretx-core
description: SigningBackend::sign docs say 'raw signature bytes' without specifying encoding. EcdsaP256Signer calls p256::ecdsa::Signature::from_slice(), which requires fixed-size 64-byte r||s encoding. AWS KMS returns DER-encoded ECDSA signatures. A backend that follows KMS conventions will always return a signature::Error from try_sign with no indication why. The contract must document whether backends must return fixed-size (r||s) or DER, and/or the adapters must handle both.
title: ECDSA/RSA byte format unspecified in SigningBackend::sign
